title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package adding Ollama models as LLM and embeddings providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, and document upload.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama exposing chat, generate, pull, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store and LangChain.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot chat requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive terminal chat wrapper with conversation history, markdown rendering, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose examples including CPU, NVIDIA, and AMD GPU setups plus WebUI sidecar.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows (chat, generate, embeddings).

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial .NET client for Ollama with async chat, generate, and model management methods.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed wrappers over Ollama’s REST API with Tokio async support.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that replies using local Ollama models with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize or rewrite selected notes locally.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app exposing Ollama models via REST with built-in rate limiting, auth, and streaming SSE.

title: ollama-llamaindex
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding integrations for Ollama enabling RAG pipelines with local models.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All UI backend option that delegates inference to a local Ollama server instead of llmodel C++.
